info.title: jvm.news API
info.description: Content hub and knowledge management for the JVM ecosystem

403.description: Not authorized to edit this post

403.description: Not authorized or edit window expired

404.description: Post or parent comment not found

post.summary: Reset password using a reset token

200.description: Reset email sent if account exists

post.summary: Reset a user's password and generate a temporary one

delete.summary: Delete a comment (soft by default, hard with ?hard=true)
